en: You can't deny his offensive output, he can play.
And we need people that can play.
ko: 우리는 잘할 수 있는 사람들이 필요해.

en: Who do you want to talk about first?
None of them. Billy, we've got 38 home runs, 120 RBIs...
Guys, who's still trying to replace Giambi? I told you we can't do it.
ko: 친구들, 우리는 아직 지암비를 대체하려고 하고 있어.

en: And we can't do it. Now, what we might be able to do...
ko: 이제 우리가 할 수 있는 것은 그를 재창조하는 거야.

en: is recreate him. Recreate him in the aggregate. The what?
And Almeda's was 291. Add that up and you get...
